brain.commentary: The council presents a mixed picture: core equity ETFs (SPY, QQQ, DIA) retain modest long conviction, while several large‑cap tech names are flat with negative composites and elevated betas. Crypto assets show flat signals, negative alpha and high volatility, making them especially fragile. Overall we stay neutral, trimming exposure modestly (multiplier 0.9) and nudging convictions toward the stronger long ideas while pulling back on the weaker, high‑beta or high‑volatility signals.
